title: ligularia tangutorum
intro: Ligularia tangutorum, also known as Mongolian Ligularia or Tangut Ligularia, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Ligularia tangutorum is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
